description: An automated email is sent to a user whose trial has expired, asking for feedback.

nodes.task_description: Identify a trial account that expired yesterday and had high engagement.

expected_outcome.expected: System automatically identifies a suitable candidate for follow-up.

nodes.task_description: Send a templated follow-up email asking about their experience and if they have any questions.

expected_outcome.expected: System sends a polite, automated follow-up email.
